description: Stylish 3 bed + den, 2.5 bath townhome in Willoughby Heights with 1,443 sqft of open-concept living. Recently updated with new paint, carpet, and flooring. Features a gourmet kitchen with quartz counters, gas range, and premium appliances. Spacious primary with walk-in closet and ensuite. Includes a versatile den, side-by-side double garage, and access to Luxia’s amenities (gym, clubhouse & more). Close to schools, parks, shopping, and Hwy 1 — modern living in a prime location.
